inputs:
  - resolved.address: alice
    resolved.coin: 200.000000 ADA
    resolved.assets: { usdm: 500, meme: 5_000_000 }
outputs:
  - address: bob
    coin: 50.000000 ADA
    assets: { usdm: 100, meme: 1_000_000 }
  - address: alice
    coin: 149.825000 ADA
    assets: { usdm: 400, meme: 4_000_000 }
fee: 0.175000 ADA
